response.original_title: An Evening at Neverland: Celebrating Michael Jackson
response.overview: Step inside Neverland and watch Michael's Private Home Movies on the bic screen; this is the ultimate pre-biopic experience. Forget the flashbulbs, the headlines, and the stage lights. For one night only we invite you to leave the world behind and enter the sanctuary Michael built for himself. This event is more than a screening - it's an intimate invitation to see the King of Pop as he saw himself. Before the world's most anticipated biopic hits theatres, this is your chance to witness the 'real" Michael. Filmed through his own lens, these private home movies offer a rare, unscripted glimpse into his life at Neverland and on the road. From quiet moments of reflection to the joyous, candid laughter shared with close friends like Elizabeth Taylor and Macaulay Culkin, this is the man behind the music.
response.title: An Evening at Neverland: Celebrating Michael Jackson
